eval.text: Place the lid onto the cup on the wooden table.
Arrange dominoes upright on a metal table with a white background, then topple them.
Assemble a chair while sitting at a table with a blue tablecloth and pink background.
Assemble a desk while sitting at a table with a green tablecloth and white background.
Assemble the drawer from furniture bench while sitting against a lavender background.
Assemble a square table while sitting at a green tablecloth-covered table with a white background.
Assemble the leg onto the furniture bench stool on a wooden table with a red background while sitting.
Assemble six legos on a blue tablecloth while sitting against a pink background.
Assemble soft legos into a tower while sitting against a white background without a tablecloth.
Assemble four structures on a wooden table while sitting against a white background.
Assemble eighteen tiles on a wooden table while sitting against a white background.
Assemble blocks into a Jenga tower on a brown background while sitting.
Fold a medium-sized tshirt on a blue tablecloth while sitting against a pink background.
Pick up a black stapler from the metal table and place it in the box lid.
Boil water in a pot, take an egg from the egg carton, boil the egg, serve it in a gray bowl placed on the round table, and place the pot and ladle in the sink.
Braid the three strands of hotpink yarn into a braid.
Stake lego bricks to build freely in any form on a blue tablecloth.
Plug the gray large phone into the usb-c cable on the blue tablecloth.
Clean two cups using a sponge and soap bottle on a pink tablecloth with a lavender background.
Scrub the surface while sitting with no tablecloth.
Clean plates, forks, spoons, and knives using sponge and dish soap on a wooden table with a red background while sitting.
Clip papers together using paperclips while sitting at a table with a white background.
Take the crayon out of the box, color on the coloring page, and place the crayon on the table.
Crumple a piece of paper on a pink tablecloth with a lavender background.
Deal cards onto a wooden table while sitting, playing pyramid solitaire.
Identify clutter objects such as red shirts, paper towel, cup, snack wrapper, and bottle on a student desk with a computer, notebook, pens, and pink tablecloth, and place them into a box.
Dry hands using a blue cloth while sitting at a wooden table with a brown background.
Place magnetic rings on index and middle finger and flick the free ring with thumb to the other side.
Place the coin on top of the thumb, flip the coin, catch it with the other hand, and put it back in position.
Flip pages of paper on a wooden table while sitting with a brown background.
Fold and stack cloths on a green tablecloth while sitting against a brown background.
Fold a piece of paper on a wooden table while sitting against a white background.
Fold a paper crane origami on a wooden table with a white background while sitting.
Place pan on stove, add oil, put bread into pan, use spatula to flip bread, then serve bread onto plate placed on round table.

Place pan on stove, add oil, crack egg into pan, fry egg, flip with spatula, and serve onto plate placed on round table, or scramble egg in bowl or cup using fork, pour into oiled pan, scramble, and serve onto plate placed on round table.
Gather three dice with one hand and roll them on a brown background while sitting.
Insert eight blocks into a dump container on a blue tablecloth with a pink background.
Insert blacktip AirPods while sitting at a wood table with a brown background.
Insert a bunny into a tote bag on a pink tablecloth with a lavender background.
Insert three books into a bookshelf while sitting at a table with a blue tablecloth and pink background.
Insert four cups into a dish rack placed on a green tablecloth with a brown background while sitting.
Insert the drawer containing the plushie into its slot while sitting against a lavender background.
Insert the round table into the wooden table while sitting against a white background.
Insert own plug into socket while sitting at a blue tablecloth with a pink background.
Remove the lid from the tube, insert the green medium shirt into the tube, and then close the tube with the lid.
Insert a tennis ball into a container while sitting at a table with a white background.
Insert the white USB into the port while sitting at a table with a green tablecloth and blue background.
Insert four utensils into a wooden table while sitting against a white background.
Knead, poke, tear the water slime, insert accessories such as the tree, and place it back into its container.
Open the ice dispenser door, pick up the bowl containing ice cubes, place the ice cubes into the ice dispenser, and close the ice dispenser door.
Pick up the silver lock and lock it using the key.
Pick up the measuring tape and measure the dimensions of the small box.
Open a box, insert five ducks into it, and then close the box on a wooden table with a white background.
Open the case, insert or remove the pad, duck, and plush while sitting at a wooden table with a red background.
Open the medium-sized tupperware and insert bread while sitting at a table with a green tablecloth and brown background.
Dip paintbrush or water brush in paint, paint on the printer paper, and clean the water brush by squeezing its handle or clean the paintbrush by swishing it in the water cup.
Peel off the sticker and place it in the stickerbook.
Pick a food item from the food basket and place it onto the plate next to it.
Pick up the orange bag from the wooden table using the right hand while sitting.
Distribute pebbles from each circle on the mancala board.
Use one or both hands and fingers to play the piano while sitting at a green tablecloth with a blue background.
Pick up coins and put them into the Connect Four game until the game is completed.
Point the gray remote at the monitor and click.
Pour coke into the gray cup on the green tablecloth.
Press the bubbles on the circle fidget Pop It toy one by one using your fingers while sitting at a blue tablecloth with a pink background.
Put away the pieces and board into the box on the wooden table with a red background.
Put the brown glasses into the beige case while sitting against a blue background.
Take toothbrush from coffee cup, unscrew toothpaste cap, put toothpaste on toothbrush, screw cap back on toothpaste, put toothpaste down, and put toothbrush back into coffee cup.
Rake linear, circular, and wavy patterns around the zen garden box using the mini rake.
Roll the red ball across the green tablecloth while sitting against a white background.
Scoop three ice cubes from the tray into the cup.
Screw the screw into the fixture using an allen key while sitting at a table with a blue tablecloth and pink background.
Unscrew the cap from the metal water bottle placed on a wooden table.
Screw the screw into the fixture while sitting at a table with a blue tablecloth and pink background.
Set up chess pieces on a chessboard placed on a wooden table.
Unfold the green tablecloth and set up the blue, red, and yellow plates, forks, spoons, knives, and cups on it.
Pick up a vanguard card from the metal table and insert it into a card sleeve.
Insert batteries into a remote while sitting at a wooden table with a white background.
Sort beads from a mixed group into three separate piles by color on the side.
Remove a block from the Jenga tower and place the block on the table.
Stack three bowls on a green tablecloth while sitting against a blue background.
Stack five coffee cups on a wooden table while sitting against a white background.
Stack four plates on a green tablecloth while sitting against a brown background.
Pick up the clear tupperware from the table with the right hand and stack it on the shelf.
Pick up one piece of paper from a stack, pretend to staple it with a stapler located on the table, then place the paper into a new stack.
Open the fridge door, pick up two food items from the table, place the food into the fridge, and close the fridge door.
Gather beads using a sweeper brush and push them into a dustpan.
Thread beads onto a thread while sitting at a table with a green tablecloth.
Thread beads onto a thread while sitting at a table with a green tablecloth.
Throw a green ball from the left hand and catch it with the same hand while sitting at a wooden table.
Collect knickknacks and toys scattered across the metal tablecloth and throw them into a box.
Tie the shoelace of the brown shoe while sitting at the wooden table.
Stretch a short rubber band and wrap it around a group of pens while sitting at a table with a lavender background.
Use fingers of one or both hands to type on a keyboard while sitting against a blue background without a tablecloth.
Use chopsticks to move cubes, irregular shaped cubes, and ribbons into bowls while sitting at a wooden table with a white background.
Twist the Rubik's cube three times while sitting at a wooden table with a white background.
Take fruit from fruit basket, turn on faucet and wash fruit, then place fruit in white bowl, and finally put fruit back in fruit basket.
Clean each utensil, dish, and cup individually using sponge and dish soap under the faucet, then place them into the dish rack.
Put dishes in sink, apply dish soap on sponge, turn on faucet, and wash dishes while sitting with a red background.
Wet rag in water bowl and wipe the outside surface of the outside door.
Wipe the phone screen with the yellow wipe while sitting at a wooden table with a red background.
Wrap a box with wrapping paper on a pink tablecloth with a lavender background while sitting.
Wrap a bread slice with plastic wrap.
Write on big paper using a pencil with black ink while sitting at a wooden table with a brown background.
Zip a big plastic bag containing a donut and a red sharpie while sitting at a table with a green tablecloth and white background.
Unzip a long case containing a plushie while sitting against a lavender background.
Unzip a long case containing a plushie while sitting against a lavender background.
